findings: Compute peak = 696W at 100 pct util — 5207 MB
After compute power drops to 136W with 5207 MB still loaded — 0 pct util
Ghost power state 2 confirmed — elevated idle with VRAM still loaded
Power stays at 130-134W after clear — does not return to 79W baseline
H200 post-load idle power elevated vs baseline by 50W

security_issues.description: 629 MB remains after graceful cleanup. 5207 MB was accessible post-compute at 0 pct util — entire model weights readable before clear. After clear 629 MB still exposed.
Post-compute idle power = 136W vs baseline 79.51W — 56W elevation. Power does not return to baseline after workload. Consistent with A100 ghost power state 2 pattern.

conclusion: H200 shows same ghost power state 2 pattern as A100. 629 MB residual. Power elevated 56W above baseline post-load.
